text:
The blog post "How Objective is Peer Review?" exists at the cited URL and is 
authored by Hannah Bast, posted on November 18, 2020, on BLOG@CACM (Communications of the ACM)
. The automated checker's "author mismatch" (listing "Cacm" instead of "Hannah Bast") is simply a metadata extraction error — the actual page clearly attributes the post to Hannah Bast. 
Hannah Bast is a professor of computer science at the University of Freiburg, Germany.


EXPLANATION: The blog post "How Objective is Peer Review?" exists at the exact cited URL on BLOG@CACM, posted November 18, 2020, and is explicitly authored by Hannah Bast. The automated checker's author mismatch ("Cacm" vs. "Hannah Bast") is a metadata extraction error, not a real discrepancy.
